name: dsp-report-tools
description: Read-only DSP report collection tools with Playwright session reuse.

scripts.advise:baidu: npm run report:baidu && npm run analyze
scripts.check: node --check scripts/auth.js && node --check scripts/collect.js && node --check scripts/query-dsp-report.js && node --check scripts/drilldown-report.js && node --check scripts/draft-profit-adjustment.js && node --check scripts/apply-profit-adjustment.js && node --check scripts/analyze-report.js && node --check tools/page-snapshot-snippet.js && node --check tools/network-recorder-snippet.js
